quote: When prices rise, liberty must lift twice as hard.
author: A. S.

quote: Free speech isn't free if it costs your voice.
author: C. L.

quote: Growth begins with a penny saved and a policy made.
author: D. K.

quote: A tax code should be a roadmap, not a maze.
author: E. T.

quote: Jobs don't grow when red tape binds.
author: F. P.

quote: A fence is a sentence of common sense.
author: G. N.

quote: Say what you will, as long as you let others say it too.
author: H. V.
